snippet.title: Ofarbajte jaja bez hemije na originalan nańćin - sasvim prirodno/ Farbanje uskrŇ°njih jaja
snippet.description:
BliŇĺi nam se vaskrs pa evo i prvog videa za ovu godinu za farbanje jaja. Ofarbajte jaja na originalan nańćin bez upotrebe hemije, sasvim prirodno. Kako bi jaja dobila ovaj efekat najbolje je koristiti bela , pa na pońćetku videa moŇĺete videti kako da izbelite obińćna Ňĺuta jaja. 

‚óŹ SASTOJCI ZA IZBELJIVANJE JAJA‚óŹ
500 ml vode
400 ml alkohlnog sirńáeta

80 gr ńćaja od hibiskusa
1 kaŇ°ińćica sirńáeta (alkoholnog ili vinskog)
prokljuńćala voda
+ malo ulja za premazivanje

snippet.title: Putin odgovorio Bajdenu: Amerika ńáe morati na ovo da rańćuna
snippet.description:
Predsednik Rusije Vladimir Putin je, reagujucŐĀi na izjavu amerińćkog predsednika DŇĺoa Bajdena, amerińćkom lideru poŇĺeleo zdravlje. ‚ÄěŇ†to se tińće izjave mog amerińćkog kolege, mi se zaista, kako je rekao, znamo lińćno. Ň†ta bih mu odgovorio? Rekao bih mu: Neka ste Ňĺivi i zdravi! ŇĹelim mu dobro zdravlje‚Äú, rekao je Putin.

Prethodno je Bajden u intervjuu za ‚ÄěEj-Bi-Si njuz‚Äú rekao da svog ruskog kolegu smatra ‚Äěubicom‚Äú. Bajden je tokom intervjua istakao da ‚Äěpoznaje‚Äú Vladimira Putina i da ruski predsednik ‚Äěpoznaje‚Äú njega. Na pitanje novinara da razjasni da li Bajden smatra Putina ubicom, amerińćki predsednik je odgovorio: ‚ÄěMhm, smatram‚Äú.

Za sve najvaŇĺnije vesti, komentare i analize posetite naŇ° sajt ‚Ėļ https://rs.sputniknews.com/

U moru informacija treba izabrati pravu.

ŇĹelite prvi da saznate vest, ne sumnjate u njenu tańćnost i ispratite najbitnije dogańĎaje u svetu koji utińću i na naŇ°e Ňĺivote? Interesuju vas miŇ°ljenja najeminentnijih struńćnjaka iz Ň°irokog spektra oblasti i komentari na sve goruńáe teme? PronańĎite to na Sputnjiku.

‚ĖĆGOVORIMO ONO Ň†TO DRUGI PREńÜUTKUJU‚Ėź

Sajt ‚ÄěSputnjik Srbija‚Äú ‚Ėļ https://rs.sputniknews.com/

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO sa RR - BAKA PRASE : TERETE ME JER SAM MNOGO JAKA GLAVA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Bogdan Ilic, poznatiji kao, Baka Prase! Kako je poceo da snima, kakve probleme donosi popularnost, o dramama i hapsenju, pricace sa mnom u danasnjoj epizodi!
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

snippet.title: MAJKE & SNAJKE - kulinarski Ň°ou - epizoda 1 - 22.03.2021.
snippet.description:
Iako su tradicionalno svekrve i snaje rivali u borbi za srce sina i muŇĺa, one ńáe se u novom kulinarskom takmińćenju zajedno boriti za porodińćnu vikendicu i druge vredne nagrade. Svake nedelje na Kurir televiziji nas ońćekuje 5 svekrva sa svojim kuvarskim iskustvom, 5 snaja u Ňĺelji da se dokaŇĺu i 5 mladoŇĺenja koji ńáe odluńćivati o tome ko pobeńĎuje!

Voditelji emisije Svetlana Seka Aleksińá i poznati beogradski kuvar Radomir RaŇ°a Vlańćińá vodińáe publiku kroz uzbudljivo kulinarsko putovanje, gde ńáe ńćuvene rivalke morati da sarańĎuju u borbi za nagradni fond od 4,3 miliona dinara!

localized.description:

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia‚Äč‚Äč

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances.

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list‚Äč‚Äč...

Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook‚Äč‚Äč
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial‚Äč‚Äč
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter‚Äč‚Äč
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube‚Äč‚Äč

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa‚Äč #FutureNostalgia‚Äč #Grammys

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agency‚Äôs website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch Jim‚Äôs video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel- 
https://youtu.be/Xvjjpzyiig4

Go sub to Perogi with Scammer Payback too- 
https://youtube.com/c/ScammerPayback

New music this time from the talented Laura Shigihara- https://open.spotify.com/track/1zOzvy6SeVJs2MEET7vyCW?si=f3fee98828fa4802

snippet.title: Sta Bi Se Desilo Kad Bi Svi Prdnuli U isto Vreme ?
snippet.description:
Ko ne lajkuje video nije dobar covek ūüėĀ

Svi smo nekad u zivotu prdnuli, nekad pustimo one stidljive gasove koje niko ne primeti, nekad one sto smrde, nekad one glasne, a nekad uz neke od njih ide i iznenadjenje. Ali sta bi se desilo kad bi u isto vreme, svi ljudi na planeti, bez imalo stida, prdnuli. Da li bi to uticalo na kvalitet vazduha ? Koliko bi se osecalo ? I sta bi jedna sibica mogla da uradi, hajmo da saznamo.

Podrzite nas na Patreonu: https://bit.ly/2DY7fn3

snippet.title: Joe Biden stumbles on steps of Air Force One
snippet.description:
The US president stumbled while boarding Air Force One on his way to visit to Atlanta, Georgia, to meet with Asian American community leaders. Biden tripped on the steps up to the plane, before recovering and carrying on unaided, turning to salute at the top. The 78-year-old fractured his right foot in November 2020 while playing with his dog Major

snippet.title: Panathinaikos OPAP Athens - Crvena Zvezda mts Belgrade Highlights | EuroLeague, RS Round 30
snippet.description:
Crvena Zvezda MTS Belgrade took a hard-fought victory from OAKA after beating Panathinaikos OPAP Athens 82-86 on Friday night. 



ABOUT EUROLEAGUE BASKETBALL 
Euroleague Basketball (EB) is a global leader in the sports and entertainment business, devoted to running the top European competitions of professional basketball clubs under a unique and innovative organizational model. Owned and administered by some of the most successful and historic clubs in the world, EB manages and organizes the continent‚Äôs two premier men‚Äôs basketball competitions, the Turkish Airlines EuroLeague and the 7DAYS EuroCup, as well as the sport‚Äôs premier under-18 showcase, the EB Adidas Next Generation Tournament. 
The EB competitions bring the elite of European basketball to all five continents and to the entire sports community through the OTT platform EuroLeague TV. EB also organizes a series of community and educational programs. Its ground-breaking corporate social responsibility program One Team features all EB clubs that have already made a difference in the lives of over 22,000 participants. Its Sports Business MBA trains future professionals in sports management. 
About One Team 
One Team, Euroleague Basketball's corporate social responsibility (CSR) program, supported by Turkish Airlines as the One Team Founding Patron and with the collaboration of Special Olympics as Proud Partner, uses basketball to achieve real social impact in our communities. With an innovative model of interconnectedness across an entire continent, Euroleague Basketball and its clubs have developed a complete CSR program that brings together activities from each team in an integrated, impactful way, working under the theme of "community integration". Each participating club develops a specific One Team project tailored to its own community needs to benefit groups in danger of exclusion due to problems such as substance abuse and gender, physical or intellectual disability. Since its founding in 2012, the One Team program has reached already directly and indirectly more than 22,000 participants through its various team projects.

localized.title: Panathinaikos OPAP Athens - Crvena Zvezda mts Belgrade Highlights | EuroLeague, RS Round 30
localized.description:
Crvena Zvezda MTS Belgrade took a hard-fought victory from OAKA after beating Panathinaikos OPAP Athens 82-86 on Friday night. 



ABOUT EUROLEAGUE BASKETBALL 
Euroleague Basketball (EB) is a global leader in the sports and entertainment business, devoted to running the top European competitions of professional basketball clubs under a unique and innovative organizational model. Owned and administered by some of the most successful and historic clubs in the world, EB manages and organizes the continent‚Äôs two premier men‚Äôs basketball competitions, the Turkish Airlines EuroLeague and the 7DAYS EuroCup, as well as the sport‚Äôs premier under-18 showcase, the EB Adidas Next Generation Tournament. 
The EB competitions bring the elite of European basketball to all five continents and to the entire sports community through the OTT platform EuroLeague TV. EB also organizes a series of community and educational programs. Its ground-breaking corporate social responsibility program One Team features all EB clubs that have already made a difference in the lives of over 22,000 participants. Its Sports Business MBA trains future professionals in sports management. 
About One Team 
One Team, Euroleague Basketball's corporate social responsibility (CSR) program, supported by Turkish Airlines as the One Team Founding Patron and with the collaboration of Special Olympics as Proud Partner, uses basketball to achieve real social impact in our communities. With an innovative model of interconnectedness across an entire continent, Euroleague Basketball and its clubs have developed a complete CSR program that brings together activities from each team in an integrated, impactful way, working under the theme of "community integration". Each participating club develops a specific One Team project tailored to its own community needs to benefit groups in danger of exclusion due to problems such as substance abuse and gender, physical or intellectual disability. Since its founding in 2012, the One Team program has reached already directly and indirectly more than 22,000 participants through its various team projects.

Zabranjeno je svako preuzimanje snimaka i objavljivanje na drugim YouTube kanalima. Svi duplikati ńáe biti uklanjani u skladu sa YouTube pravilima. Iz ovoga ńáe biti izuzeti samo oni koji dobiju specijalnu dozvolu od vlasnika autorskih prava.

Autorska prava: "BALKAN INFO - Zvanińćni kanal"
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCLG5Qu54Q7gywaCeDs5etuQ

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i Ňĺele da pomognu rad naŇ°e produkcije to mogu uńćiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. Trudińáemo se da ostanemo dosledni naŇ°oj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i Ň°irenju istine bez cenzure.

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Sa tobom sve je rulet, od milke do nule,
Brze nego Tesla S, ej
Tako ti je sa princezama, voli kad je vezana,
Pssst, Samo niko da ne cuje.

Ele ele ele ele
Ko bi reko da je mala ziva vatra.
Ele ele
Njene misli koje skriva nocu gresnije od pakla.

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Mala moze casove da daje,
Kada igra opasna je,
I svi kazu aj jaj jaj jaj,

Nocas lepa je ko Raj,
Kukovima uvija,
I svi kazu samo aj jaj jaj

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Sa tobom sve je rulet, od milke do nule,
Brze nego Tesla S, ej
Tako ti je sa princezama, voli kad je vezana,
Pssst, Samo niko da ne cuje.

Ele ele ele ele
Ko bi reko da je mala ziva vatra.
Ele ele
Njene misli koje skriva nocu gresnije od pakla.

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Mala moze casove da daje,
Kada igra opasna je,
I svi kazu aj jaj jaj jaj,

Nocas lepa je ko Raj,
Kukovima uvija,
I svi kazu samo aj jaj jaj

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

snippet.title: Lamborghini Urus v BMW X6M - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:

Check out Yiannimize - http://youtube.com/yiannimize

It‚Äôs Saturday morning, so you know what time it is‚Ä¶ Time for another Mat vs Yianni showdown!! 

We‚Äôve got a BMW X6M Competition going up against a Lamborghini Urus (no prizes for guessing who‚Äôs in which car)! These two SUV heavyweights are going head-to-head over the quarter-mile, and when looking at stats alone, you might think it‚Äôll be an easy win for the Urus! 

Under the Lambo‚Äôs bonnet, you‚Äôll find a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which can deliver 650hp and 850Nm. As for the BMW, it may pack a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8, but it only puts down 625hp & 750Nm! But that‚Äôs not all‚Ä¶ The Urus is also 200kg lighter than the X6M! 

Now, of course, we know the BMW has one trick up its sleeve - an EPIC launch system! The question is, will it be enough to snatch the win on this wet track? There‚Äôs only one way to find out‚Ä¶ LET‚ÄôS RACE!

#poslerucka #happytv

snippet.title: Emanet 142. B√∂l√ľm | Legacy Episode 142
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

U gradu je kriminal, lova je u firmama
Bebe nose minival - brańáa nose kilogram
Kola ot Bulgaria - Ňĺivim sa gorilama
Roba prva ruka, letim Kosovo-Bolivija

Dok piŇ°amo uz vetar (uu uU)
Pijemo uz JuŇĺni vetar (uu uu)
Vodim igru kao Petar MaraŇ° (uu uu)
Nisi brŇĺi nego metak, kalaŇ° (uu uu) 

Ratata, 24 karata
Oko vrata i za brata oko ruke zlatan sat
Na ulici - ljubi brat, ovo ti je juŇĺni gas
Ovo nije Ň†vajcarska, Balkan bure baruta

Hook:

Uspeh i mońá
Nocas ne ńćekaj me ja ti neńáu dońá
Uspeh i mońá 
Sve Ň°to dońĎe mi za dan to ode mi za nońá
Uspeh i mońá
I samo pare leńće ovu bol
juŇĺni vetar - alkohol, droga, suze krv i znoj

Verse 2 (Eldorado)

Jajare misle da menjaju svet
samo na rafalno hekler je 5
prenecu kofer i dobijaŇ° ket
sad sam na granici zovem za pet
naŇ°a gerila je spremna do zuba
cistimo teren ko da smo UDBA
metkovi kamate kurve i gudra
brza frizura i devetka duga
nece ni Bog viŇ°e da sudi
pravo kroz staklo metak u grudi
nocu se Ň°ibamo danju smo budni
sanduci borbene opreme puni
cetiri je strane sveta
veliki izbor nema Ň°ta
ja kod mene dva paketa
Nek mi sudi 92


Hook:

Uspeh i moc 
Nocas ne cekaj me ja ti necu doc
Uspeh i moc 
Sve Ň°to dodje mi za dan to ode mi za noc
Uspeh i moc 
I samo pare lece ovu bol
juŇĺni vetar - alkohol, droga, suze krv i znoj

veliki izbor nema Ň°ta
ja kod mene dva paketa
Nek mi sudi 92


Hook:

Uspeh i moc 
Nocas ne cekaj me ja ti necu doc
Uspeh i moc 
Sve Ň°to dodje mi za dan to ode mi za noc
Uspeh i moc 
I samo pare lece ovu bol
juŇĺni vetar - alkohol, droga, suze krv i znoj

snippet.title: MEDICO - Mamma Mia (prod. by EnelBeatz)
snippet.description:
INSTAGRAM PROFILI:
Medico : https://www.instagram.com/whoismedico/

Music: Medico
Text: Medico
Arrangement: EnelBeatz, Arpino Sachi
Back vocal: MaŇ°a Sitarica
Mix & Master: Arpino Sachi


Video production: Vedad Mandra | xvedmanx
Directed by: Medico, Vedad Mandra
Script: Vedad Mandra, Medico
Camera: Vedad Mandra
CC VFX Post: Vedad Mandra
Costume: Emina Tsili

TEXT

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrti se sve dharma 
mama mia

ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x2


vers1
moje sve htjele bi bit
 jer na meni samo je lagerfeld karl e 
zelja joj htjela benz
 nije ni bitno ko sjedi sa strane

moli da voli brzo da boli
moli za gole sate
prolij pa dolij 
glumi mi dolly dobro ta zna sta radi

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugi il treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal

takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrati se sve dharma 
mama mia

 ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x3


vers 2.
da li mislis na mene ko prije
prisjetis se probije ko noz
navijas ti za mene i lijek
tvoj sam jedini ja antidot

znas ti moje namjere ne nisu namjerne
ali vuce me na zlo
velike su razmjere izmedju zavjere
razlika je nebo tlo

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugil treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal
takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

snippet.title: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, opens up about her family
snippet.description:
For the first time Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, publicly discusses her father Thomas Markle and her half-sister's forthcoming tell-all book in this previously unaired clip from her and Prince Harry's sit-down with Oprah Winfrey. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

Subscribe to the "CBS This Morning" YouTube channel: https://bit.ly/3ceNNCX
Watch more "CBS This Morning": http://bit.ly/1T88yAR
Like "CBS This Morning" on Facebook: https://on.fb.me/1LhtdvI
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Instagram: https://bit.ly/1Q7NGnY
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Twitter: https://bit.ly/1Xj5W3p
Follow CBS News on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3bdNXek

Get the latest news and best in original reporting from CBS News delivered to your inbox. Sign up for newsletters: https://cbsn.ws/1RqHw7T

Get your news on the go! Download CBS News mobile apps for Android and iOS: https://cbsn.ws/1Xb1WC8

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream local news live, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites and originals anytime, anywhere with Paramount+. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/309gCe2

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: LIVE: GRAMMY Awards Premiere Ceremony | March 14 at 3pm ET / 12pm PT
snippet.description:
Music‚Äôs Biggest Night kicks off with the Premiere Ceremony, featuring 8 special performances and more than 70 GRAMMYs awarded across music genres ranging from classical and jazz to R&B, Global music and more. 

Hosted by current three-time GRAMMY nominee Jhen√© Aiko, the Premiere Ceremony will feature a number of performances by current GRAMMY nominees, including: Nigerian singer, songwriter and rapper Burna Boy, jazz band Terri Lyne Carrington + Social Science, blues musician Jimmy "Duck" Holmes, classical pianist Igor Levit, Latin electropop musician Lido Pimienta, singer, songwriter and performance artist Poppy, and singer, songwriter and composer Rufus Wainwright. 

Kicking off the event will be a tribute performance celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic Marvin Gaye track "Mercy, Mercy Me (The Ecology)". The special all-nominee ensemble performance will feature Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra, Thana Alexa, John Beasley, Camilo, Regina Carter, Alexandre Desplat, Bebel Gilberto, Lupita Infante, Sarah Jarosz, Mykal Kilgore, Ledisi, Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez, PJ Morton, Gregory Porter, Grace Potter, s√§je, Gustavo Santaolalla (Bajofondo), Anoushka Shankar, and Kamasi Washington. 

All of the Premiere Ceremony performers and the host are nominated this year, as are most of the presenters. Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra for Best Latin Jazz Album (Tradiciones); Aiko for Album Of The Year (Chilombo), Best R&B Performance ("Lightning & Thunder" featuring John Legend) and Best Progressive R&B Album (Chilombo); Alexa for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Ona); Beasley with Somi With Frankfurt Radio Big Band for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Holy Room: Live At Alte Oper), Best Large Jazz Ensemble Album (MONK'estra Plays John Beasley), Best Arrangement, Instrumental or A Cappella ("Donna Lee") and Best Arrangement, Instrumentals and Vocals ("Asas Fechadas" with Maria Mendes); Burna Boy for Best Global Music Album (Twice As Tall); Burr for Best Comedy Album (Paper Tiger); Camilo for Best Latin Pop or Urban Album (Por Primera Vez); Carrington + Social Science for Best Jazz Instrumental Album (Waiting Game); Carter for Best Improvised Jazz Solo ("Pachamama"); Chika for Best New Artist; Desplat for Best Instrumental Composition ("Plumfield"); Gilberto for Best Global Music Album (Agora); Holmes for Best Traditional Blues Album (Cypress Grove); Infante for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (La Serenata); Jarosz for Best American Roots Song ("Hometown"), Best Americana Album (World On The Ground); Kilgore for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Let Me Go"); Ledisi for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Anything For You"); Levit for Best Classical Instrumental Solo (Beethoven: Complete Piano Sonatas); Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (Bailando Sones Y Huapangos Con Mariachi Sol De Mexico De Jose Hernandez); Morton for Best Gospel Album (Gospel According To PJ); Pimienta for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Miss Colombia); Poppy for Best Metal Performance ("BLOODMONEY"); Porter for Best R&B Album (All Rise); Potter for Best Rock Performance ("Daylight"), Best Rock Album (Daylight); s√§je for Best Arrangement, Instruments and Vocals ("Desert Song"); Santaolalla with Bajofondo for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Aura); Shankar for Best Global Music Album (Love Letters); Wainwright for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album (Unfollow The Rules); and Washington for Best Score Soundtrack For Visual Media (Becoming).

snippet.title: Emanet 143. B√∂l√ľm | Legacy Episode 143
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#LimonAńüacńĪ

snippet.title: BEZ USTRUńĆAVANJA - DraŇĺa Petrovińá: Vladimir Cvijan je negde ubijen, zabranjeno je da se o tome piŇ°e!
snippet.description:
U najnovijem izdanju emisije "Bez ustruńćavanja" gost je bio glavni i odgovorni urednik dnevnog lista Danas Dragoljub DraŇĺa Petrovińá. DraŇĺu Petrovińáa nije toliko iznenadila vest o smrti Vladimira Cvijana koliko ga je iznenadila ńáutnja medija kojima je zabranjeno da o toj vesti piŇ°u. On istińće da mu je joŇ° pre tri godine kolega iz Srpskog telegrafa rekao da je Vladimir Cvijan ubijen, ali je ovo samo dokaz da postoji centar koji odluńćuje koje vesti mogu, a koje vesti ne smeju da se objavljuju. Petrovińá podseńáa da je tako bilo i kada je sin ŇĹeljka Mitrovińá pregazio devojku na peŇ°ańćkom prelazu kada je do njega stigla sms poruka koju je Suzana Vasiljevińá, savetnica Aleksandra Vuńćińáa, uputila uredniku jednog lista gde ga moli da ne bude grub prema mlańĎem Mitrovińáu. Vest da je kompanija United media kupila list Danas izazvala je brojne komentare, ali DraŇĺa Petrovińá tvrdi da ta transakcija neńáe uticati na ureńĎivańćku politiku lista. Istińće da se nisu prodali ńźilasu, veńá Ň†olaku, ali da ńáe politika lista ostati nepromenjena. List Danas otvoren je za dijalog i polemiku i objavljuje tekstove predstavnika razlińćitih politińćkih stavova zbog ńćega je redakcija ńćesto kritikovana ńćak i od najvernijih ńćitalaca. Poznati srpski pisac Svetislav Basara godinama je redovni kolumnista lista Danas, ali je na iznenańĎenje svih preŇ°ao u tabloid Kurir. Glavni motiv prelaska po reńćima DraŇĺe Petrovińáa je bio visoki honorar. Kada je reńć o reŇĺimskim medijima zanimljiv je mentalni sklop njihovih urednika, jer je DraŇĺa Petrovińá imao  interesantno iskustvo sa vlasnikom Pinka ŇĹeljkom Mitrovińáem koji je posle negativne kampanje protiv Danasa bez griŇĺe savesti pokuŇ°ao da ostvari i privatni kontakt sa DraŇĺom.

Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.title: Kuńáa od srca S07, porodica Velińćkovińá 01  PINK 21. 03. 12h premijerna epizoda porodice Velińćkovińá 02
snippet.description: Projekat "Kuńáa od srca" ima za cilj zbrinjavanje najugroŇĺenijih porodica na teritoriji Republike Srbije. Ministarstvo rada i socijalne politike prepoznalo je zajednińćke ciljeve i prikljuńćilo se projektu ‚ÄĚ Kuńáa od srca ‚ÄĚ u pomońái pri zadovoljavanju osnovnih potreba ugroŇĺenih porodica. Porodice koje su deo projekta ‚ÄĚ Kuńáa od srca ‚ÄĚ uz podrŇ°ku Ministarstva rada i socijalne politike imaju priliku da budu stambeno zbrinute, materijalno potpomognute, vrańáene u obrazovni sistem Ň°to rezultira resocijalizacijom svih ńćlanova porodice uz akcentovanje na najmlańĎe ńćlanove druŇ°tva. Osnovna ideja projekta ‚ÄĚ Kuńáa od srca ‚ÄĚ jeste ukljuńćivanje celokupne zajednice u pomońá porodicama koje su od strane Ministarstva proglaŇ°ene najugroŇĺenijim. Ono Ň°to izdvaja serijal ‚ÄúKuńáa od srca‚ÄĚ, jeste ńćinjenica da je to prvi domańái rijaliti, koji se pored reŇ°avanja stambenog pitanja kroz grańĎevinske radove, bavi i reŇ°avanjem porodińćnih i meńĎuljudskih odnosa. Pravila serijala su jasno definisana i glase: 1. Izgradnja kuńáe po projektu traje 31dan i ukoliko nije gotova serijal tu zavrŇ°ava, objekat ostaje u zateńćenom stanju, sa porukom da se zajedniica ukljuńći I pomogne u zavrŇ°etku radova. 2. Da imaju imovinu najbliŇĺih koji su spremni da je ustupe za izgradnju Kuńáe od srca . 3. NajbliŇĺi ńćlanovi porodice, prijatelji I komŇ°ije moraju imati pozitivno miŇ°ljenje o izabranoj porodici. 4. Punoletni ńćlanovi izabrane porodice moraju biti druŇ°tveno odgovorni : da nisu uŇĺivaoci alkohala, droge kao I da nisu skloni nasilju, a imaju izraŇĺenu crtu o brizi za decu. Ukoliko bilo koji ńćlan porodice koji je uńćesnik serijala prekrŇ°i bilo koje pravilo, serijal se prekida istog trenutka kao I sama gradnja.

snippet.title: BEZ USTRUńĆAVANJA - Milan Dumanovińá: Vuńćińá je eleminisao Belivuka jer se osilio i nije ga viŇ°e sluŇ°ao
snippet.description:
Gost emisije ‚ÄúBez ustruńćavanja‚ÄĚ bio je nekadaŇ°nji pripadnik Uprave kriminalistińćke policije Milan Dumanovińá o kojoj nije Ň°tedeo reńći i otvoreno govorio o umeŇ°anosti pripadnika policije i drugih drŇĺavnih institucija u kriminalne radnje, koje se kako kaŇĺe tek otkrivaju. Naime, Dumanovińá smatra da su afere tek pońćele da se otkrivaju i da ńáe se u narednom periodu tek otkrivati, Ň°to bi po njegovim reńćima moglo ozbiljno da uzdrma vlast. Po njegovim reńćima sukob izmeńĎu NebojŇ°e Stefanovińáa i Aleksandra Vuńćińáa, otkrio je dosadaŇ°nje afere, ali ńáe nas tek ońćekivati otkrivanje novih. Milan Dumanovińá je sa profesionalne strane komentarisao hapŇ°enje kriminalne grupe Veljka Belivuka, ali i otvoreno govorio o nekadaŇ°njoj drŇĺavnoj sekretarki Dijani Hrkalovińá. Ko su kljuńćni ljudi iz vrha vlasti, policije, BIA-e, fudbalskog kluba Partizan, koji su bili umeŇ°ani sa kriminalnim grupama, saznańáete u emisiji. Dumanovińá je podsetio da su on i kolega Mladen Trbovińá dobili otkaze 2016. godine kada su ukazali na nepravilnosti u radu policije i joŇ° tada izneli tvrdnje da je Dijana Hrkalovińá kako kaŇĺe ‚Äúprivatizovala‚ÄĚ policiju. O ovom sluńćaju o kojem se joŇ° uvek vodi sudski epilog, ali i o pokretu ‚ÄúOslobodjenje‚ÄĚ, samo su neke od mnogih tema o kojima je govorio Milan Dumanovińá.

localized.description:
Gost emisije ‚ÄúBez ustruńćavanja‚ÄĚ bio je nekadaŇ°nji pripadnik Uprave kriminalistińćke policije Milan Dumanovińá o kojoj nije Ň°tedeo reńći i otvoreno govorio o umeŇ°anosti pripadnika policije i drugih drŇĺavnih institucija u kriminalne radnje, koje se kako kaŇĺe tek otkrivaju. Naime, Dumanovińá smatra da su afere tek pońćele da se otkrivaju i da ńáe se u narednom periodu tek otkrivati, Ň°to bi po njegovim reńćima moglo ozbiljno da uzdrma vlast. Po njegovim reńćima sukob izmeńĎu NebojŇ°e Stefanovińáa i Aleksandra Vuńćińáa, otkrio je dosadaŇ°nje afere, ali ńáe nas tek ońćekivati otkrivanje novih. Milan Dumanovińá je sa profesionalne strane komentarisao hapŇ°enje kriminalne grupe Veljka Belivuka, ali i otvoreno govorio o nekadaŇ°njoj drŇĺavnoj sekretarki Dijani Hrkalovińá. Ko su kljuńćni ljudi iz vrha vlasti, policije, BIA-e, fudbalskog kluba Partizan, koji su bili umeŇ°ani sa kriminalnim grupama, saznańáete u emisiji. Dumanovińá je podsetio da su on i kolega Mladen Trbovińá dobili otkaze 2016. godine kada su ukazali na nepravilnosti u radu policije i joŇ° tada izneli tvrdnje da je Dijana Hrkalovińá kako kaŇĺe ‚Äúprivatizovala‚ÄĚ policiju. O ovom sluńćaju o kojem se joŇ° uvek vodi sudski epilog, ali i o pokretu ‚ÄúOslobodjenje‚ÄĚ, samo su neke od mnogih tema o kojima je govorio Milan Dumanovińá.
